    Heng Huang

Brief Biography:

Heng Huang received his Ph.D. in Computer Science from Dartmouth College, and his M.S. and B.S. from Shanghai Jiao Tong University. He is a Brendan Iribe Endowed Professor in Computer Science at the University of Maryland College Park.
Contact Information:

Office: Brendan Iribe Center for Computer Science and Engineering, IRB 3238
           8125 Paint Branch Drive, College Park, MD 20742.
Email: heng@umd.edu
Research Interests:

AI and Machine Learning, Health Computing, Precision Medicine
Please note that all my research works are publicly available
News:

Three papers were accepted by ECCV 2026.

Seven papers were accepted by ICML 2026.

Three papers were accepted by MICCAI 2026, KDD 2026, IJCAI 2026.

Seven papers were accepted by ICLR 2026.

Two papers were accepted by CVPR 2026.

Five papers were accepted by NeurIPS 2025.

Three papers were accepted by ICCV 2025.

Two papers were accepted by ACM MOBICOM 2025 and EMNLP 2025.
Information for Future Students:

I am looking for Postdoc, PhD students, highly motivated for doing research in the areas of machine learning, large-scale optimization, NLP, computer vision, bioinformatics, and biomedical image analysis. If you are interested, please contact me.
Recent Conferences related to my research:

ECCV, abstract due Feb 26, full paper due Mar 6
NeurIPS, abstract due May 04, full paper due May 06
EMNLP, ARR due May 25
AAAI, abstract due Jul 21, full paper due Jul 28

How to evaluate papers in top computer science conferences?
For reference purpose, there are some reasonable public CS conference ranking lists: Ref1, Ref2. For CS program ranking: CS open rankings.
